DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-06-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NO OPPOSITION FILED; MOTION GRANTED. THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE COURT ORDER OF JANUARY 21, 2021. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)S -

LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-21-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE TERMINATING SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED AND IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS. PLAINTIFF SHALL APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION BEFORE FEBRUARY 11, 2021. IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SO APPEAR, HIS COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO SANCTIONS. SANCTIONS WERE NOT REQUESTED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar May-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Terminating Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition filed; motion granted. The case is dismissed without prejudice pursuant to the Court order of January 21, 2021.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff?S Deposition Or In The Alternative Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TIMOTHY J. FAMA, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3921) for Defendant City and County of San Francisco;
No appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition Or In The Alternative Terminating Sanctions.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for defendant authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The Motion is unopposed and is granted as follows. Plaintiff shall appear for his deposition before February 11, 2021. If Plaintiff does not so appear, his complaint is dismissed without prejudice.

No sanctions. Sanctions were not requested in the Notice of Motion.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
